intent: Deny because the clock evaluates one second before the capability's notBefore (negative clock skew at the lower bound), which the corpus classifies under the catch-all `expired` failure class (collapsing every out-of-window verdict, whether pre-notBefore or post-notAfter, into a single deny path). Pairs with `01_one_second_past` (positive-side, post-notAfter) to exercise both edges of the validity window.
name: deny_expired/03_clock_skew_neg
